text: Hey Steffi. I hope you had a nice weekend. I am making this video to walk you through the modifications that you have made to the second image. And here what I'm going to do is I'm going to present you with two options and we have done both following the suggestions that you gave us. And I'm going to send you both in the chat and you can pick one out of these or you can, if you have any further feedback, you're welcome to provide us with those. Now here's the first one and here's another one. Both of them are in. Both of them we have covered. We have used the entire space for the lifestyle image and the suggestions that you gave us. So let me know what you think about it. This is. I hope you can also present it in tomorrow's meeting. And. And after you do this, I have one request for you. So if you like this, if this is okay, I would request that you give me feedback for all other images at one time together. I mean, so that we can process them, we can work on them as a batch. That will be a time effective for time efficient for both of us. We can deliver it faster rather than doing one at a time. So yeah, if you do think that this is okay, then we'll go ahead. I mean I'll welcome your feedback for the others so that you can go ahead with all of them together. Thank you so much for watching the video and I'm looking forward to hearing from you. Bye for now.
